title: senecio sisymbriiformis
intro: Senecio sisymbriiformis, also known as Sisymbrium-leaved ragwort, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include being a natural anti-inflammatory and antiseptic. The health benefits of Senecio sisymbriiformis include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using them in a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
